subcodes.first_line: In this day, the people of God are those souls who have clung fast to the cord of love for Him, exalted be His glory, and to the hem of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حزب الله نفوسی هستند که بحبل محبت حق جل جلاله متمسکند و بذیل فضلش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the power of words; of speech, @wisdom [hikmat]
